entities.description: Conjure a wave of ice in all directions, [Knockback|Knocking Back] enemies based on how close they are to you. Casting Ice Nova targeting near a Frostbolt [Projectile] will cause it to originate from the Frostbolt instead of you. [Consume|Consumes] a [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to leave a patch of [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground].

Jump into the air, damaging and [Knockback|Knocking Back] enemies with your mace where you land. Enemies you would land on are
pushed out of the way.

[Shapeshift] into a burning monstrosity and leap through the air to crash down upon the earth, [Slam|Slamming] twice and creating [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures]. [Consume|Consumes] [Rage] to create additional [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures].

Charges at an enemy, bashing it with the character's shield and striking it. This knocks it back and stuns it. Enemies in the way are pushed to the side. Damage and stun are proportional to distance travelled. Cannot be supported by Multistrike.
Cause a [Corpse] to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.
Consume a [Corpse] to create a volatile core that seeks out enemies and [Ignite|Ignites] enemies near it. The core explodes at the end of its duration.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to [Gain] [Fire] Damage but deal less [Cold] and [Lightning] Damage.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to [Attack] faster.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to [Attack] faster.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to [Attack] faster at the cost of Damage.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making them fire extra [Projectile|Projectiles]. Also lowers [Attack] and Cast speed of supported skills, as well as lessening their damage.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making them fire extra [Projectile|Projectiles]. Also lowers [Attack] and Cast speed of supported skills, as well as lessening their damage.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] Skills, making them fire [Projectile|Projectiles] in a circle. Does not Support Skills which rain down [Projectile|Projectiles] from above.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making those [Projectile|Projectiles] travel faster.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making those [Projectile|Projectiles] travel faster, and granting them a chance to [Pierce] Enemies.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making those [Projectile|Projectiles] travel faster, and causing increases and reductions to [Projectile] speed to also apply to Damage.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to [Gain] [Cold] Damage but deal less [Fire] and [Lightning] Damage.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to gain [Accuracy].
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to gain [Accuracy], and never miss against Enemies on full Life.
Supports any skill with an area of effect, making it larger.
Supports any skill with an area of effect, making it larger.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to [Gain] [Lightning] Damage but deal less [Cold] and [Fire] Damage.
Consume a [Corpse|Corpse] or [Charges|Power Charge] to create a short-lived Zombie. Zombies created from [Charges|Power Charges] are [Empowered] and also create two additional non-empowered Zombies.
Supports any skill, making it cost less to use. Cannot support skills which reserve [Spirit].
Supports any skill, making it cost less to use. Cannot support skills which reserve [Spirit].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to deal more damage with [Critical|Critical Hits] but have less [Critical|Critical Hit] chance.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to [Knockback|Knock Back] enemies.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing their [Physical] damage to [LifeLeech|Leech] Life.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing their [Physical] damage to [LifeLeech|Leech] Life.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing their [Physical] damage to [LifeLeech|Leech] Life and preventing [LifeLeech|Leech] gained this way from being removed at full Life.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing their [Physical] damage to [ManaLeech|Leech] Mana.
Supports Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies, causing their [ManaLeech|Mana Leech] to recover based on [ElementalDamage|Elemental] damage instead of [Physical] damage.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to [Gain] [Chaos] Damage but deal less Damage of other [DamageTypes|Types].
Teleport to a enemy and [Strike] them. Consumes [Charges|Power Charges] to perform additional teleporting [Strike|Strikes] on nearby enemies.

Launch a spray of sparking [Projectile|Projectiles] that travel erratically along the ground until they hit an enemy or expire. [Consume|Consumes] a [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to fire many sparks in a circle.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making their [Projectile|Projectiles] [Pierce|Pierce] an enemy but deal less damage after doing so.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making their [Projectile|Projectiles] [Pierce|Pierce] an enemy.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making their [Projectile|Projectiles] [Pierce|Pierce] an unlimited number of enemies, losing damage as they do so.
Creates a wall of ice which holds back enemies. Targets under the wall are damaged and pushed back.

Unleash a [Nova] of [Lightning] damage to [Electrocute] enemies. Enemies close to you take no damage while enemies at the edge of the ring take significantly more damage. Enemies [HitDamage|Hit] can be [Electrocute|Electrocuted] by all [Lightning] damage for a short duration.
Supports [Melee] [Attack|Attacks], boosting their [Physical] damage at the cost of [Attack] Speed.
Supports [Spell|Spells], causing them to cast faster.
Supports [Spell|Spells], causing them to cast faster.
Supports [Spell|Spells], causing them to cast faster for each different [Spell] you've cast [Recently].
[Curse] all enemies in an area, [Slow|Slowing] them and making other effects on them expire more slowly.
[Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, making them deal less damage.
[Mark] a target. The next [Critical|Critical Hit] the target receives [MarkActivate|Activates] the [Mark], [Consume|Consuming] it to deal extra damage and grant you a [Charges|Frenzy Charge].
[Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [Chaos|Chaos] [Resistances|Resistance].

Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the [CullingStrike|Cull] threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a [Debuff] to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the [CullingStrike|Cull] threshold during its duration. Can also be used on Ball Lightning [Projectile|Projectiles]. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals [Lightning|Lightning] damage to surrounding enemies. If targeting an enemy, the explosion also creates [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground]. Creates a [Lightning] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] on successful use. Highlights enemies that can be [CullingStrike|Culled].

Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the [CullingStrike|Cull] threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a [Debuff] to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the [CullingStrike|Cull] threshold during its duration. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals [Physical|Physical] damage to surrounding enemies and inflicts [Impale|Impale].
[Strike] with a forceful blow, knocking enemies back and weakening their [Armour|Armour].
Fires a large number of arrows into the air, to land in an area around the target after a short delay. Consumes a Frenzy Charge on use to fire additional arrows.
Supports any skill with an area of effect, causing that area to be smaller but any area damage it deals to be higher.
Supports [Melee] [Attack|Attacks], causing them to deal more damage against [Bleeding] enemies, but preventing them from inflicting [Bleeding].

Rain a storm of flaming bolts over the targeted area. Can [Consume] all three types of [ElementalInfusion|Elemental Infusion], creating a much larger storm when [ElementalInfusion|Fire-Infused], causing lightning bolts when [ElementalInfusion|Lightning-Infused], and raining ice bolts when [ElementalInfusion|Cold-Infused].

Suffuse your [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaff] with electrical energy, then [Slam] the ground to deal damage in a large cone in front of you. Consumes your [Charges|Power Charges] to fire [Lightning|Lightning] [Projectile|Projectiles] forwards from the impact.

Attempt to rip the lifeforce from an enemy. Enemies within [CullingStrike|Culling] range will be highlighted and instantly killed on [HitDamage|Hit], granting a [Charges|Power Charge]. Can only target Enemies in [CullingStrike|Culling] range.
Fire a charged arrow at the target. On hitting an enemy or wall, the arrow will fire [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] beams at nearby enemies.
Emit an [Aura] that grants you and [Allies] in your [Presence] additional [Total] [EnergyShield|Energy Shield].

Raise a [Totem|Totem] that [Slam|Slams] the ground around it, repeatedly damaging nearby enemies. [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] erupts when hit by this [Slam|Slam], damaging enemies standing on it. The [Totem] cannot create [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground]. This Skill can be used while [Shapeshift|Shapeshifted].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing them to [Blind|Blind] on [HitDamage|Hit].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing them to [Blind|Blind] on [HitDamage|Hit] with increased effect.

While active, taking [Lightning] damage builds up charge on you. Reaching full charge expends all charge to [Trigger] this skill, creating a [Chain|Chaining] lightning bolt that arcs to nearby enemies.
An arc of [Lightning|Lightning] stretches from the caster to a targeted enemy and [Chain|Chains] on to other nearby enemies. [Shock|Shocked] enemies [HitDamage|Hit] release damaging pulses.

While active, conjures an icy barrier that gains stages over time. While the barrier has stages, [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] that hit you will remove a stage to cause a burst of ice that deals [Cold] [Spell] damage to the attacker.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, making those [HitDamage|Hits] [Penetration|Penetrate] enemy [Fire|Fire] resistance.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, making those [HitDamage|Hits] ignore enemy [Fire] resistance.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, making those [HitDamage|Hits] [Penetration|Penetrate] enemy [Cold|Cold] resistance.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, making those [HitDamage|Hits] [Penetration|Penetrate] enemy [Lightning|Lightning] resistance.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills and any other skills that [Chain|Chain], causing them to [Chain|Chain] additional times.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills and any other skills that [Chain|Chain], causing them to [Chain|Chain] additional times.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills and any other skills that [Chain|Chain], causing them to [Chain|Chain] additional times.
Supports [Projectile] skills, making their [Projectile|Projectiles] [Fork].
[Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [Fire] [Resistances|Resistance].
[Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [Cold] [Resistances|Resistance].
[Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [Lightning] [Resistances|Resistance].
[Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances].

Gain fuel by spending Mana on any Skill, then use the accumulated fuel to conjure a torrent of [Fire] from your hand, [Ignite|Igniting] enemies in front of you. The flames grow stronger the longer you [Channelling|Channel]. [Consume|Consumes] a [Fire] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to also create [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground]. Cannot gain fuel while using this skill.

Supports [Spell|Spells] that affect an area around you or a target location. Supported [Spell|Spells] echo, causing their effects to happen again after a short delay. Cannot support [Channelling] skills [Remote] skills or skills which are [Trigger|Triggered].
Supports skills which create [Minion|Minions], bolstering the Elemental [Resistances] of those [Minion|Minions]. Cannot support skills which create undamageable [Minion|Minions].
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making those [Projectile|Projectiles] travel more slowly.
Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills, making those [Projectile|Projectiles] travel more slowly.
Supports [Spell] Skills that fire [Projectile|Projectiles], causing increases and reductions to cast speed to also apply to [Projectile] speed.
Emit an [Aura] that boosts the [Resistances|Fire Resistance] of you and [Allies] in your [Presence].
Emit an [Aura] that boosts the [Resistances|Cold Resistance] of you and [Allies] in your [Presence].
Emit an [Aura] that boosts the [Resistances|Lightning Resistance] of you and [Allies] in your [Presence].
Emit an [Aura] that boosts the [Resistances|Chaos Resistance] of you and [Allies] in your [Presence].

Channels to build up a large explosion. The longer you channel, the larger the area of effect and damage of the explosion. The explosion occurs after using another skill or after a short period without casting.
After a short preparation time, you attack repeatedly with a ranged weapon. These attacks have a small randomised spread. Only works with Bows and Wands. This skill cannot be Triggered.

Fire a slow-moving [Projectile] that moves through enemies. The [Projectile] itself does not [HitDamage|Hit] enemies, but repeatedly discharges bolts of [Lightning] at nearby enemies. Consumes a [Fire] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to slow down over time, create [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground] as it travels, and explode dealing [Fire] damage in an Area after it dissipates.

Impale a Skeleton on a bone spike to shield your [Minion|Minions] while the spike remains, reducing the amount of damage taken from [HitDamage|Hits]. Taking a [HitDamage|Hit] that deals damage above a certain threshold will cause that [Minion|Minion's] shield to absorb all damage from that [HitDamage|Hit], then explode.  The bone spike is itself a [Minion], and shields itself. If it dies, shields on your other [Minion|Minions] disappear.
While active, enemies you sufficiently [Overkill] with non-[Herald] [Attack|Attacks] will cause an explosion that [Ignite|Ignites] nearby enemies based on the [Overkill] damage dealt.
While active, [Shatter|Shattering] an enemy with a non-[Herald] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] will cause an icy explosion that deals [Attack|Attack] damage to surrounding enemies.

While active, killing [Shock|Shocked] enemies with a non-[Herald] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] will cause subsequent [Attack|Attack] [HitDamage|Hits] to release lightning bolts which deals [Attack|Attack] damage to all surrounding enemies.
Turn socketed [Curse] skills into vile [Aura|Auras], applying their effects to all nearby enemies.

Perform a [Warcry], [Empowered|Empowering] subsequent [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] if there are enemies nearby. Enemies in the warcry's area are destabilised and will Combust on death. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an [Charges|Endurance Charge].
Supports [Attack|Attacks] and [Warcry|Warcries] you use yourself. [Freeze|Freezing] an enemy with supported skills infuses all of your [Attack|Attacks] with [Cold] damage for a short time.
Supports [Attack|Attacks] and [Warcry|Warcries] you use yourself. [Freeze|Freezing] an enemy with supported skills infuses all of your [Attack|Attacks] with [Cold] damage for a short time.
Supports [Attack|Attacks] and [Warcry|Warcries] you use yourself. [Freeze|Freezing] an enemy with Supported Skills infuses you and your allies with [Cold] damage for a short time.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, making it more effective at [Freeze|Freezing] enemies.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, making it more likely to [Shock].

Stamp your spear, destroying all Bloodstone Lances on each enemy in your [Presence] to cause a damaging explosion around that enemy. Each explosion gains new benefits when reaching higher thresholds of Bloodstone Lances removed from an enemy, causing them to deal more damage, have increased area of effect, and [Leech] Life from enemies caught in the blast.

[Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and lob a ball of magma that deals area damage as it hits the ground. The skill [Chain|Chains], bouncing forward to deal damage multiple times. Impacts on [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures] or Volcanos will activate them as though they were [Slam|Slammed].

Create a pulsing [Orb] of frost. Each pulse inflicts [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Exposure|Exposure] on nearby enemies. When the [Orb]'s duration ends, it [DetonationTime|Detonates], dealing [Cold|Cold] damage to surrounding enemies and leaving behind a [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion].
Create an [Orb|Orb] of electricity that fires [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] bolts at nearby enemies. The [Orb] leaves behind a [ElementalInfusion|Lightning Infusion] [Remnant] when it expires.

Smash the ground, dealing damage in an area and leaving behind [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] that slows enemies. The [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] erupts in a powerful [Aftershock] after a duration. Cannot create [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] on top of an existing patch, or if you already have the maximum number of active patches.

Afflict a single enemy with a [Debuff] that deals [Chaos|Chaos] damage over time. If the enemy dies while affected by Contagion, it and all other [Chaos|Chaos] damage over time [Debuff|Debuffs] spread to nearby enemies and refresh their durations. Reanimating or detonating a corpse affected by Contagion will cause the [Minion] or explosion to
spread Contagion on hit.
Casts a debilitating effect on enemies in an area, Hindering their movement and applying a stacking Withered debuff that increases the Chaos Damage they take. This effect can stack up to 15 times.
Fire a [Projectile|Projectile] that applies a powerful [Chaos|Chaos] damage over time debuff to enemies it hits.
Supports [Spell|Spells] that [HitDamage|Hit] enemies, boosting their damage but preventing them from dealing [Critical|Critical Hits].

Slams the ground with a Mace, Sceptre, Axe or Staff, creating a wave of broken ground that damages enemies in an area in front of you. Enemies hit by the wave will release a circular shockwave, dealing damage to other enemies around them.
Fire a slow-moving [Pierce|Piercing] [Projectile|Projectile] that is effective at [Chill|Chilling] enemies and explodes on colliding with terrain.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to deal more [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] but be unable to inflict [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments].
Sacrifice the life of a [Minion] to deal [Chaos] damage in an area around it. If you have no [Minion|Minions], your own life is sacrificed instead.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, [AilmentSpread|Spreading] [Ignite|Ignites] it inflicts to nearby enemies after a delay.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, giving it a chance to inflict [Bleeding].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, giving it a chance to inflict [Bleeding].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to inflict [Bleeding].

Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to deal more [Melee] [Physical] Damage to [Bleeding] Enemies, but be unable to inflict [Bleeding] itself. Supported Skills also inflict [Incision] on [HitDamage|Hit].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, giving it a chance to [Poison|Poison] enemies.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, giving it a chance to [Poison|Poison] enemies.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, giving it a chance to [Poison|Poison] enemies and causing it to inflict more powerful [Poison|Poisons] against [Bleeding] Enemies.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to [Maim|Maim] enemies.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], granting them extra [Fire] damage against [Ignite|Ignited] enemies but making them unable to [Ignite] enemies themselves.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies or inflicts [Shock], causing its [Shock|Shocks] to be inflicted less often but last longer.
Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its [Physical] damage at the expense of all other [DamageTypes|Damage Types].
Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its [Physical] damage at the expense of all other [DamageTypes|Damage Types].

Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its [Physical] damage at the expense of all other [DamageTypes|Damage Types], as well as giving [HitDamage|Hits] from that skill a chance to ignore [Physical] Damage reduction.
Supports any damaging skill that you use yourself, causing it to deal more damage if you move a sufficient distance while using the skill. Teleportation does not count towards the distance travelled.
Supports [Spell|Spells] you cast yourself, tracking the mana you spend to cast them. Spending enough mana grants a burst of Mana Regeneration and Cast Speed.
[Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay. making [HitDamage|Hits] against them ignore a portion of their [Armour|Armour].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, giving it a chance to [Withered|Wither] enemies on [HitDamage|Hit].
Fire a [Pierce|Piercing] [Projectile] that seeks out enemies. Enemies hit are inflicted with a [Debuff] that [Hinder|Hinders] them and deals [Chaos] damage over time for a short duration.
Supports [Spell|Spells] you cast yourself, increasing their area of effect when cast. Cannot support [Channelling] Skills or Skills with a Cooldown.

Augment yourself with temporal magic for a short duration, [Empowered|Empowering] the next [Spell] you cast to repeat multiple times. Cannot [Empowered|Empower] [Channelling] Skills or Skills with a Cooldown.
Supports [Spell|Spells] you cast yourself, making their effect reoccur up to five times when cast, but giving them a moderate Cooldown. Cannot support [Channelling] Skills.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.
Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.
Supports [Melee|Melee] [Attack|Attacks], causing them to grant [Rage|Rage] on [HitDamage|Hit].
Supports [Melee|Melee] [Attack|Attacks], causing them to grant [Rage|Rage] on [HitDamage|Hit].
Supports [Melee|Melee] [Attack|Attacks], causing them to grant [Rage|Rage] on [HitDamage|Hit]. Supported Skills have signficantly higher [Attack] speed while you are not at maximum [Rage].
While active, stores a portion of the [Poison] Damage you deal. Using this Skill unleashes the stored [Poison|Poison] to damage and [Poison] enemies around you.
Supports skills which create [Minion|Minions], making them deal and take more damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable [Minion|Minions].
Supports skills which create [Minion|Minions], granting them less damage taken but making them deal less damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable [Minion|Minions].
Supports skills which create [Minion|Minions], granting them less damage taken but making them deal less damage.
Supports skills which create [Minion|Minions], causing those [Minion|Minions] to be unable to deal or take Damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable [Minion|Minions].

Supports skills which create [Minion|Minions] which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to [Burning|Burn]. Damage dealt by the [Burning] is based off the Life of the supported [Minion].

Supports skills which create [Minion|Minions] which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to [Burning|Burn]. Damage dealt by the [Burning] is based off the Life of the supported [Minion].

Supports skills which create [Minion|Minions] which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to [Burning|Burn]. Damage dealt by the [Burning] is based off the Life of the supported [Minion].
Deploy a [Ballista] [Totem] that fires bolts skyward, to explode a short time after landing.
Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown. Cannot support [Meta], instant, or [Trigger|Triggered] Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of [Minion|Minions].
Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown. Cannot support [Meta], instant, or [Trigger|Triggered] Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of [Minion|Minions].

Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown and causing them to recover your Life when a Skill is used and goes on cooldown. Cannot support [Meta], instant, or [Trigger|Triggered] Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of [Minion|Minions].

Perform a damaging [Warcry], [Knockback|Knocking Back] nearby enemies and [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunning] enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun]. If an enemy is [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned] or a currently [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned] enemy is [HitDamage|Hit], this Skill [Empowered|Empowers] subsequent [Slam|Slams] to perform an additional [Aftershock|Aftershock]. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an [Charges|Endurance Charge].

[Slam|Slam] the ground, sending out a fissure that deals area damage to enemies it passes under and thrusts a spike from the ground when it ends. [Warcry|Warcries] performed near the spike will cause it to shatter, damaging surrounding enemies.
Place a Sigil on the ground, providing a powerful [Spell] Damage [Buff] to you and [Allies] while standing in it. The [Buff] becomes more powerful the more mana you spend while standing in the Sigil.

Create a wall of [Fire|Fire] in front of the character, which [Ignite|Ignites] everything within its area. Any [Projectile|Projectiles] fired through the wall by you and [Allies] deal added [Fire|Fire] damage. [Consume|Consumes] a [Lightning] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to also add [Lightning] damage to the [Projectile|Projectiles].
Supports [Curse] skills you cast yourself, causing them to trigger Doom Blast on [Curse|Cursed] enemies when the [Curse] expires.
Detonate a [Curse] on every enemy in an area, causing explosions of [Chaos] damage but removing the [Curse]. Can only detonate [Curse|Curses] for which at least half of the duration has expired.
Expel your own blood as [Chain|Chaining] blood tendrils in a cone in front of you. Enemies [HitDamage|Hit] by the tendrils take [Physical] damage and are inflicted with [Bleeding].
Conjure a bloody scythe that sweeps across the targeted area, dealing [Physical] damage to enemies and applying [CriticalWeakness|Critical Weakness]. Cannot be [Trigger|Triggered].
Supports any Skill, turning its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve [Spirit].

Supports any Skill, turning a portion of its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve [Spirit]. Supported Skills [Gain] a portion of their Life cost as extra [Physical] Damage.
Supports [Strike] skills, causing them to steal a [MonsterModifiers|Modifier] from [Rarity|Rare] monsters they kill.
Supports [Strike] skills, causing them to steal two [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] from [Rarity|Rare] monsters they kill.

Supports Melee [Strike] skills, causing them to steal a [MonsterModifiers|Modifier] from [Rarity|Rare] monsters they kill for a lengthy duration, while being unable to damage enemies not on low Life. Does not modify skills used by [Minion|Minions].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on [LowLife|Low Life].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on [LowLife|Low Life].
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on [LowLife|Low Life], as well as dealing more damage while you are on [LowLife|Low Life].

Attack enemies with a melee [Strike|Strike]. The [Strike|Strike] will cause a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] on enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun]. Upon causing a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] it will also create a Shockwave, dealing a large amount of damage in an area.

Fires a single eye projectile which constantly releases shard projectiles in a spiral. The shards will damage enemies they impact, dealing cold damage. The eye cannot damage enemies. When the eye dissipates or collides with terrain, it releases a faster spiral of extra shards.

Create a storm that sucks in enemies and deals [Physical] damage over time. A Tornado that overlaps an [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surface] absorbs that surface's [Debuff], applying it to enemies inside the Tornado and causing the Tornado to deal extra damage of that element.
Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, making its [Shock|Shocks] more effective but reflecting them back to you as well.

Sends a [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] [Projectile] from the [Shock|Shocked] enemy towards a nearby Drenched enemy, dealing [Spell] damage.

Mirrors of Refraction appear in your [Presence] periodically. [HitDamage|Hitting] a mirror with a [Spell] [Projectile] causes it to shatter, copying the projectiles in a nova around the destroyed mirror. Copied [Projectile|Projectiles] may be copied again when colliding with other mirrors.

While active, taking [HitDamage|Hit] damage from enemies to your [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] causes you to gain [Armour] for a short duration. Attach a Toxic Pustule to the enemy, which [DetonationTime|Detonates] after a delay, dealing [Attack] damage. They can also be [Poison|Poisoned], causing them to [DetonationTime|Detonate] faster and more violently.
Creates a deadly slash towards the target, dealing [Attack] damage.

"You knew the twisted plan these fools devised. As Tale Woman, you are their compass in the sandstorm. Yet... you did not act. And now we mourn these honoured dead. You must pay."
 
Varashta condemned Navira to the ritual of the barya, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.

"And you... there was no excuse for your actions. You defiled them! You have tainted the very sands with the blood of your own! Yet the war rages on. You have achieved nothing. You must pay." 

Varashta condemned Kelari to the ritual of the barya, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.
ascendancy enable fire djinn passive

"My heart was fractured. I believed Kelari's words. I knew not his true nature... his ambition. I convinced Ruzhan there were cowards among his ranks. I failed you. And I accept my fate." 

Navira confessed her failure to Varashta.

"Wipe the tears from your face, dear Navira. I did not deceive you. I meant every word. I will forever cherish you, my beloved. Know that I did it all for you... for our future!" 

Kelari pleaded with the Tale Woman.

"Kelari, you deceiver! I fell for your words, but no longer. Your sentence is a fate too good for you! I would give anything to bring back those who fell to your lies. Instead... I mourn my choices." 

Navira lambasted Kelari a final time.

"Listen not to his simpering words, he means to languish before you to weaken your resolve! He is duplicitous. An assassin, thriving on deception and lies. His lust for power is what drove his choice!" 

Outrage trembled in Ruzhan's voice at the sentencing.

"Knowing where and when to plunge your knife is more important than the sharpness of your blade. I will not forget my error... and I will be a living example of your wisdom, dear Sekhema." 

Kelari accepted Varashta's sentence and committed himself to her.

"The snare was set on our fallen. Beetles burst from their flesh, flooding the sands. Their exploding carapaces halted the advancing enemy... but it was not enough. And for that... I grieve." 

Kelari admitted his wrongdoing to Varashta.

"I have seen countless battles. I know war! The taste of defeat... The taste of victory! But in this war... everything is at stake. So yes, those you speak of will know my blade. I will do whatever I must!" 

Ruzhan confided in his Tale-Woman, Navira.

"I stand before you, as your humble servant. Though I was betrayed, I would do it all again, if it would have saved us. But I accept your sentence. I will atone. I pledge myself to you... forevermore." 

Ruzhan accepted his fate at the barya ritual site.

"Yes... they fell by my blade and fire lashed them for their betrayal! No dekhara is exempt from fighting back the Winter before us. Lest they too know the Doom of the Desert!" 

Ruzhan fumed at Varashta, in pure defiance.
